title: EvidenceDossier — engineer artifact (E-series)
description: Institutionalized doubt, layered. Six-vendor-intersection JSON. The L0 script validate_report RE-RUNS the harness (stale command_output fails) and checks every layer verdict + evaluator calibration record + red-light artifact exist. Anchors: E1 six layers, E2 pressure layer, E3 capability/regression split, E6 evaluator audit, E9 pre-registered stop.

layers.description: E1: every eval case tags its layer; a release decision cites at least one of E-L0..E-L4.

layer.description: syntax / single-case / module / under-pressure / workflow / institutional

eval_kind.description: E3: capability and regression have different lifecycles; graduating a saturated capability set into regression is legal

notes.description: for partial/red: which failures, whether known-class; E-L5 = online rework signal collection point status

evaluator_calibration.description: E6: every judge/linter carries a golden-sample alignment record. Uncalibrated evaluator = the green-but-wrong source. Sample-selection authority belongs to the gate/battery, must include historical-misjudgment hard cases + negatives.

evaluator_kind.description: C5 objective/subjective fork. deterministic = a byte/numeric comparator (no self-preference, no style bias, no Unknown exit) — validate_report EXEMPTS it from the judge-bias fields (fill them with honest neutral values). llm_judge = the E6 discipline applies in full.

golden_sample_count.description: for deterministic = the test-case count; for llm_judge = the calibrated golden set

model_baseline.description: E6/A37: re-verify on base-model change; prior record auto-expires

unknown_rate.description: capped; a judge forced to score is suspect

different_source_from_builder.description: A31: judge must not share source with builder or the evaluated output

audit_dimensions.description: must include style/verbosity bias (2026 #1 bias 0.10-0.76), not just position/exact-match

red_light_history.description: The RED artifact: tests failed BEFORE the fix (anti-vacuity). For prose skills, a behavioral baseline of the prompt without the skill.

red_before_green.description: red log timestamp precedes first green commit (E5 state assertion)

pressure_sentinels.description: E2: >=1 mid-position x high-distractor x 64K sentinel per key module. Distractors must be same-domain-but-stale/wrong, not neutral filler.

distractor_kind.description: e.g. same-domain stale-version doc; neutral filler is BAD

stop_conditions.description: E9: pre-registered BEFORE the loop. Adversarial stops are budget/marginal, never absolute-zero. Strictness scales with spec.failure_cost.

marginal_threshold.description: e.g. N consecutive rounds no new P1/P2

verification.description: The L0 script re-runs this; a stale command_output fails the gate.
